---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(palmerpenguins)
library(knitr)
library(rmarkdown)

penguin_counts <- table(penguins$species, penguins$island)
print(penguin_counts)
```

```{r}
#| label: penguin-fig
#| fig-cap: "Body mass to flipper length"

ggplot(penguins, aes(y = body_mass_g, x = flipper_length_mm)) + 
    geom_point()
```

This is my referencing to this plot @penguin-fig
